title: Mojtaba Khamenei: son and successor to Iran’s supreme leader
summary_full: The 56-year-old had no official post during his father's rule, but was speculated to be acting behind the scenes to pull strings at the heart of power in Iran
summary_public: The 56-year-old had no official post during his father's rule, but was speculated to be acting behind the scenes to pull strings at the heart of power in Iran

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: pull strings at the heart of power in Iran
